tasks.title: RS-MEM-001 Add AGENTS.md and repo agent rules
tasks.description: Merge AGENTS.md operating rules with existing Memory OS. No runtime changes.
tasks.details: Mission, Hard Constraints, Required Workflow, Definition of Done, Memory Rules, Report Format, Consumer Loan Target merged into AGENTS.md.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify AGENTS.md exists and references LESSONS_LEARNED.md and project-memory.

tasks.title: RS-MEM-002 Add project-memory baseline files
tasks.description: Create flat scaffold files that bridge the Obsidian vault without deleting existing notes.
tasks.details: Added README.md, decisions.md, architecture.md, station-ops.md, classifier-notes.md, incidents.md, agent-rules.md, daily-status-template.md.
tasks.testStrategy: find project-memory -maxdepth 1 -type f lists scaffold files.

tasks.title: RS-MEM-003 Add LESSONS_LEARNED.md with known lessons
tasks.description: Record dashboard stale container, classifier false positives, and station health lessons.
tasks.details: Three dated entries with context, root cause, fix, prevention.

tasks.title: RS-MEM-004 Add Cursor/Claude compatibility files
tasks.description: Add radiosense-agent-rules.mdc and update CLAUDE.md shim.
tasks.details: Cursor rule + CLAUDE.md point to AGENTS.md final report format.

tasks.title: RS-MEM-005 Validate no runtime behavior changed
tasks.description: Confirm docs-only scaffold; no ingestor/worker/classifier/DB changes.
tasks.details: File existence checks only; no docker restart or pipeline jobs.
tasks.testStrategy: git diff excludes runtime modules except docs/config/memory.

tasks.title: RS-TM-001 Initialize and configure Task Master AI
tasks.description: Init .taskmaster/, configure Ollama models, import RS-MEM tasks, document workflow.
tasks.details: Use task-master init -y --no-git. Set Ollama qwen3:8b. Manual tasks.json import. Fix MCP config.
tasks.testStrategy: task-master list shows tasks; task-master next returns RS-TM-001 or next pending.

tasks.title: RS-PMEM-001 Evaluate and initialize projectmem
tasks.description: Evaluate projectmem compatibility; do not duplicate project-memory vault.
tasks.details: See project-memory/projectmem-evaluation.md. Blocked until user picks agent host.
tasks.testStrategy: Evaluation doc exists with status and recommendation.
